title: Thich Nhat Hanh
blurb: Founder of the Plum Village tradition; brought mindfulness to millions.

title: Tara Brach
blurb: Creator of RAIN; blends Western psychology with Buddhist practice.

title: Jack Kornfield
blurb: Co-founder of Spirit Rock; a leading Western insight teacher.

title: Pema Chödrön
blurb: Beloved teacher on working with difficulty and fear.

title: Steven C. Hayes
blurb: The originator of Acceptance & Commitment Therapy.

title: Marsha Linehan
blurb: The developer of Dialectical Behaviour Therapy.

title: Richard Schwartz
blurb: The creator of Internal Family Systems.
